title: ステイヤーズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Stayers Stakes—a graded race at an
incredible 3,600 meters, even longer than the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One could even say it's more of a challenge than
the Kikuka Sho. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The longer a race is, the more time you have to
soak up the joy of it all. Don't you agree, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright couldn't be more nonchalant. In
fact, she seems almost giddy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am. But even so, I've dreamed of this
day for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for the day when I would run in
a long race like the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text: Woooow! So this is the Tenno Sho plaque...

text_block_list.name: Young Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's so pretty! I... I might be weak right now, but
one day...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If nothing else, at least my heart is prepared for
the race ahead. The Mejiros may never have
expected much of me, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I always dreamed of the day I would become
useful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but wonder if this mental preparation
is part of the reason she did so well with the
distance at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can repeat that result in the Stayers Stakes
today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, McQueen, I can't help but
feel a little sad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I kinda wanted to watch Bright run in
medium-distance races, like I did. See how far she
could go, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You really have taken her under your wing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That said, it is not up to us and our sentimentality
to decide the path she must run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With this race, the way forward will reveal itself.
Should she spend her senior year focusing on
long-distance or medium-distance races?

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text: Or perhaps... both.

text_block_list.name: Ryan & McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to see her performance as well, in
person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Grandmother, you really came all the way out
here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Today's race is only a G2!

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of their rank, there are some races one
cannot miss.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Not if one wants to know the future of the
Mejiros.
